task_description: Rewrite image architecture from base64-in-workspace-JSON to Firebase Storage with URL references. Upload files to images/{projectId}/{workspaceId}/{imageId}, store download URLs in image objects, delete Storage files on image/workspace/project deletion, reuse URLs on duplication.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds. No test suite exists in this project. No Dockerfile present. All acceptance criteria verified through code inspection: Storage service created, upload/delete/render/duplicate flows rewritten, backward compatibility maintained, error resilience added.
